chunks.text: Technical Reports - John Chuang. Driving dataset in the wild: Various driving scenes (EECS-2016-92) by Kurt Keutzer and Byung Gon Song.
chunks.question: What is the title of the technical report with ID EECS-2016-92?
chunks.answer: Driving dataset in the wild: Various driving scenes.

chunks.text: Modeling the Adoption of new Network Architectures (EECS-2007-41) by Dilip Antony Joseph, John Chuang and Ion Stoica.
chunks.question: Who are the authors of the report EECS-2007-41?
chunks.answer: Dilip Antony Joseph, John Chuang, Ion Stoica.
